name: Welcome Email
subject: Welcome to {{companyName}}, {{employeeName}}!
body:
Welcome aboard!

Dear {{employeeName}},

We're excited to have you join {{companyName}} as {{position}} in the {{department}} department.

Your start date is {{startDate}}.
description: Sent to new employees upon onboarding

name: Payroll Released
subject: Payroll for {{period}} has been released
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your payroll for {{period}} has been processed.

Gross Pay: {{grossPay}}
Net Pay: {{netPay}}

View your payslip here.

name: Expense Claim Approved
subject: Your expense claim #{{claimId}} has been approved
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your expense claim #{{claimId}} for {{amount}} ({{category}}) has been approved by {{approverName}}.

Reimbursement will be processed on {{reimbursementDate}}.
description: Notification when expense claim is approved

name: Expense Claim Rejected
subject: Your expense claim #{{claimId}} has been rejected
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your expense claim #{{claimId}} for {{amount}} has been rejected.

Reason: {{rejectionReason}}
description: Notification when expense claim is rejected

name: Leave Approved
subject: Your leave request ({{leaveType}}) has been approved
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your {{leaveType}} leave from {{startDate}} to {{endDate}} ({{days}} days) has been approved by {{approverName}}.
description: Notification when leave request is approved

name: Performance Review Reminder
subject: Reminder: Performance Review due by {{deadline}}
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your {{cycleName}} performance review is due by {{deadline}}.

Please complete your self-assessment here.

name: Interview Invitation
subject: Interview Invitation: {{position}} at {{companyName}}
body:
Dear {{candidateName}},

We'd like to invite you for an interview for the {{position}} role.

Date: {{interviewDate}}
Time: {{interviewTime}}
Location: {{interviewLocation}}

name: Offer Letter
subject: Job Offer: {{position}} at {{companyName}}
body:
Dear {{candidateName}},

We're pleased to offer you the position of {{position}} at {{companyName}}.

Salary: {{salary}}
Start Date: {{startDate}}
Benefits: {{benefitsSummary}}
description: Offer letter sent to selected candidates

name: Document Expiry Reminder
subject: Document Expiry Reminder: {{documentName}} expires on {{expiryDate}}
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your {{documentName}} will expire on {{expiryDate}} ({{daysLeft}} days remaining).

Please upload the renewed document here.

name: 13th Month Pay Notification
subject: 13th Month Pay for {{year}}
body:
Dear {{employeeName}},

Your 13th month pay for {{year}} has been computed.

Amount: {{thirteenthMonthAmount}}

This will be released on or before December 24.
description: Seasonal notification for 13th month pay release
